name: Hawthorn Extract
summary: Hawthorn Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cardiovascular Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Vascular Function Support, not treatment claims.
description: Hawthorn Extract is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Cardiovascular Health. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Vascular Function Support, not treatment claims.
safetyNotes: Dizziness, hypotension; interacts with cardiac medications.

qualifiers.population: NYHA class II-III chronic heart failure
